description_long: This object consists of a dome-shaped structure made from irregularly sized, rounded gray stones stacked to form a small enclosure with an open entrance. The stones are arranged in a roughly hemispherical pile, with gaps between some of the rocks, giving it a rustic, hand-built appearance. Inside the stone dome, a faint orange glow suggests the presence of a fire or heat source. Adjacent to the dome, there is a small, round, brownish vessel resembling a clay pot, placed on a flat, square base that mimics earth or pavement. The surface of the stones appears matte and slightly rough, with subtle variations in color and shading. The overall look is utilitarian and primitive, evoking traditional outdoor ovens or fire pits found in parks or communal spaces.
description: A dome-shaped pile of gray stones forms a small enclosure with an open entrance, accompanied by a clay pot on a flat base. The stones are rough and irregular, suggesting a rustic, hand-built structure.
description_view_0: The open entrance of the stone dome is visible, revealing a faint orange glow inside, with a clay pot placed to the left on the base.
description_view_1: The back of the stone dome is shown, with no visible entrance or pot, highlighting the rounded, continuous stone surface.
description_view_2: The side of the dome is visible, with the clay pot now positioned to the right, and the entrance partially obscured.
description_view_3: The dome is viewed from the opposite side, showing the clay pot in the foreground and the solid stone structure behind it.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on a flat surface
attribute_pattern: Irregular, natural stone arrangement with no artificial carvings or regular patterns; subtle mottling from stone coloration.
attribute_weathering: Rough and slightly weathered, with minor surface pitting and dullness indicating exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with flat base but would blend with natural or landscaped park settings; the clay pot adds a utilitarian touch.
